title: Part 4 – Exposé : changement d'horaire d'une conférence téléphonique
instructions: Écoutez le message, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Hi, this is a message for the marketing team. This is to confirm that the conference call with our partners in Tokyo has been moved from three o'clock to five o'clock this afternoon, due to a scheduling conflict on their side. The dial-in number and access code remain the same as in the original invitation. Please make sure to test your headset before the call, since we had some audio issues during the last meeting. If you're unable to attend at the new time, please let me know as soon as possible so I can send you the meeting notes afterward. Thanks, and talk to you all later.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of this message?
choices: To announce a change in meeting time
To introduce a new team member
questions.explanation: Le message annonce que la conférence téléphonique a été déplacée de 15h à 17h.

questions.prompt: Why was the meeting time changed?
choices: A scheduling conflict with the Tokyo partners
A request from the marketing team
questions.explanation: "due to a scheduling conflict on their side" (les partenaires de Tokyo).

questions.prompt: What does the speaker ask people to do before the call?
questions.explanation: "Please make sure to test your headset before the call".
